description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define two stages (test and deploy) and a job named caligram:react in the test stage that runs npm install --silent --depth 0 followed by npm run test. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only for the enable-gitlab-pages ref, executes npm install --silent and npm run build-storybook, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact that expires after one week. No caches, services, or extra variables are needed.
